title: Use structured output (JSON mode) for agent responses
source: Anthropic API structured output / tool_use response format
description: Agent outputs are currently parsed from raw stdout using regex (e.g., delegate.py parses JSON from text, meeseeks.py uses regex to extract fields like **Beschrijving** and **Complexiteit**). Claude supports structured output via tool_use and JSON mode, guaranteeing valid JSON responses that match a schema — eliminating fragile regex parsing and reducing agent output failures.
proposed_changes: Define response schemas in schemas.py for each agent type (e.g., MortyTaskResult with status, files_changed, summary, description fields). When using the API or Agent SDK, pass these as tool definitions or response_format constraints. Update delegate.py's output parsing (around line 778+) and meeseeks.py's parse_meeseeks_output() to consume structured JSON directly instead of regex-parsing raw text. This eliminates the fragile regex patterns like `re.search(r'\*\*Beschrijving\*\*:')` in meeseeks.py.
